ONE ROOM AVAILABLE IN OUR COLOCATION IN SCHAERBEEK 
Queer friendly 
Hi future coloc,
One room will be available in our cozy and nice colocation in a townhouse in Schaerbeek from the 1st of June. We are looking for a new roommate of more or less our age (26 - 36). Sharing daily moments together is important, as well as doing some activities together from time to time. You’d be sharing the house with 7 other (cute) people. FR DU GR EN speaking, so the common language is mostly english.
About the room: it is 14 m2 on the 1st floor and furnished (bed, a big wardrobe, a bookshelf, and a small desk).
The house has a nice garden to chill. There are two bathrooms (one with a bath), a large kitchen, an attic for homeworking, a basement for the laundry (with a washing machine), a small garage for the bikes and all the needed utilities.
We are located right next to Saint-Josse, so not far from the center, but also a 10min bike from Schuman/Madou or North station, 10min bike from Josaphat Park 
. There are busses and tram as nearby as well. It’s a relatively safe area, quiet and peaceful.
The landlord asks for a deposit of two months. Long-term stay preferred
The rent for the room is 445€ + 135€ for the utilities.
The 135€ of charges includes everything: water, electricity, insurance, internet, but also olive oil, toilet paper, laundry detergent, all of that.
If you are interested, pm me with a description of yourself: your age, where you are from, what language(s) you are comfortable with, if you have experience with co-housing, your interests, etc. Don't be shy! 
!! We will normally be organizing visits on the 18th of May and/or on the 25th of May, and will decide before the 1st of June. !!
Welcome and hope to see you soon!

Beautiful apartment to sub rent next to the Luxembourg station
“Chez Emma” is a beautiful, fully equipped, quiet, and comfortable 100m2 apartment ideally located at the entrance to the European Quarter, in the heart of Ixelles, just steps away from numerous shops, restaurants, and bars, with quick access to public transportation and close to downtown. Available for stays of at least two nights and up to one week (breakfast included!).
The apartment is very quiet, colorful, and cozy, filled with plants both inside and outside. It includes:
• A large bedroom with a double bed. Since the sun doesn’t come out until around noon, there’s no risk of being woken up by its light
• The bedroom opens onto a large 9m² south-facing terrace with a barbecue, plenty of plants, organic herbs, berries, a large table, two large benches, a parasol, and two lounge chairs
• A fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher, refrigerator, oven, microwave, air fryer, and kitchen appliances
• A comfortable living room with a small desk, a library of art books, and a collection of vinyl records and CDs of all genres, for your listening pleasure
• A dining room with a large table and 6 chairs
• A shower room with a sink and toilet.
Also at your disposal:
• A washing machine
• A hair dryer
• A TV with various channels, Netflix, and Amazon
• A Nintendo Switch
• A DVD player
• An Apple TV
• Fast, unlimited internet.
• A folding bike (subject to a rental deposit)
This apartment is reserved for quiet guests, either solo or in duo.
Pets are unfortunately not allowed.
You are welcome to invite friends over for a meal or a drink as long as it remains quiet and guests leave before midnight.
Out of respect for the neighbors, parties in the apartment and on the terrace are not permitted.
More infos in MP

Beautiful apartment to sub rent next to the Luxembourg station
“Chez Emma” is a beautiful, fully equipped, quiet, and comfortable 100m2 apartment ideally located at the entrance to the European Quarter, in the heart of Ixelles, just steps away from numerous shops, restaurants, and bars, with quick access to public transportation and close to downtown. Available for stays of at least two nights and up to one week (breakfast included!).
The apartment is very quiet, colorful, and cozy, filled with plants both inside and outside. It includes:
• A large bedroom with a double bed. Since the sun doesn’t come out until around noon, there’s no risk of being woken up by its light
• The bedroom opens onto a large 9m² south-facing terrace with a barbecue, plenty of plants, organic herbs, berries, a large table, two large benches, a parasol, and two lounge chairs
• A fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher, refrigerator, oven, microwave, air fryer, and kitchen appliances
• A comfortable living room with a small desk, a library of art books, and a collection of vinyl records and CDs of all genres, for your listening pleasure
• A dining room with a large table and 6 chairs
• A shower room with a sink and toilet.
Also at your disposal:
• A washing machine
• A hair dryer
• A TV with various channels, Netflix, and Amazon
• A Nintendo Switch
• A DVD player
• An Apple TV
• Fast, unlimited internet.
• A folding bike (subject to a rental deposit)
This apartment is reserved for quiet guests, either solo or in duo.
Pets are unfortunately not allowed.
You are welcome to invite friends over for a meal or a drink as long as it remains quiet and guests leave before midnight.
Out of respect for the neighbors, parties in the apartment and on the terrace are not permitted.
More infos in MP

CHAMBRE MEUBLÉE DISPO DEBUT MAI / HAUT DE SAINT-GILLES 
 Chouette charmante maison Bruxelloise fraîchement rénovée avec parquet bois, moulures, cheminées en marbre. 
Elle est composée de :
 Cave avec buanderie et local vélo 
 +1 : Espace cuisine et salon, cuisine full équipée neuve, petit balcon orienté sud : grande table et 2 canapés 
 +2 : une chambre dispo à 640+100
 Salle de bain avec douche à l'italienne à partager avec Adèle et Joe
 La maison est située dans le haut de Saint-Gilles, à la frontière avec la commune d'Ixelles. La zone est très bien desservie en transports en communs, à une dizaine de minutes du centre, à une dizaine de minutes à pied de l'avenue Louise. 
La maison a été rénovée il y a à peine un an, nous sommes donc à la recherche d'une personne un minimum ordonnée et pour qui vivre dens un envirronement propre est important.
 La coloc se situe dans un super quartier très vivant, l'on y trouve des friperies, des bars, des cafés pour bruncher, supermarchés, un peu de tout ! 
 
 La chambre est meublée, il y a un lit double, un bureau, penderie, miroir
 C'est une coloc très intrnationnale : Allemands, Italiens, et Français, Autrichienne et Australien, tous aux alentours des 25 ans. Nous sommes dons à la recherche d'une personne dans la même tranche d'âge et à l'aise en anglais.
 Tu partageras les lieux avec : 
Matthieu, Franco-Italien, il revient d'un erasmus à Utrecht et il est à Bruxelles pour un stage tout en étant en train de terminer son master ; 
Joe, Allemand, il travaille à Bruxelles depuis plsuieurs années
Adèle, Française, elle est également en stage et en année mémoire en master. 
Lena, Autrichienne, elle est stagiaire Bluebook DG ECHO. 
Sean, Australien, il est en stage dans un cabinet d'architecture
Frederica, Italienne, étudiante en Architecture également
 dispo dès début mai et jusque fin aout minimum! Plus long terme c'est encore mieux!
Nous n'acceptons ni couples ni animaux !
 Si la chambre t'intéresse, n'hésite à m'envoyer une peti
